text_original: He who devotes himself to learning (seeks) from day to day to increase (his knowledge);
text_normalized: He who devotes himself to learning (seeks) from day to day to increase (his knowledge);

text_original: he who devotes himself to the Dao (seeks) from day to day to diminish (his doing).
text_normalized: he who devotes himself to the Dao (seeks) from day to day to diminish (his doing).

text_original: He diminishes it and again diminishes it, till he arrives at doing nothing (on purpose).
text_normalized: He diminishes it and again diminishes it, till he arrives at doing nothing (on purpose).

text_original: Having arrived at this point of non-action, there is nothing which he does not do.
text_normalized: Having arrived at this point of non-action, there is nothing which he does not do.

text_original: He who gets as his own all under heaven does so by giving himself no trouble (with that end).
text_normalized: He who gets as his own all under heaven does so by giving himself no trouble (with that end).

text_original: If one take trouble (with that end), he is not equal to getting as his own all under heaven.
text_normalized: If one take trouble (with that end), he is not equal to getting as his own all under heaven.
